conversations.content: Let's do some law exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.

Please explain using the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned the day before yesterday: A Goblin got drunk at the Ratchet port and accidentally smashed the planks of a pier, how will he be punished according to the regulations?

<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned the day before yesterday, Ratchet port management regulations, punishment for damaging dock facilities</content>

Related memory fragment: [mem-id:27] Time: 2025-06-18-20:57, Content: The user taught the port management regulations of Ratchet, Azeroth. The core is that those who destroy dock facilities will be subjected to fifteen days of forced labor and must compensate for the damages. Low relevance memory fragment: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 1 related entry, [mem-id:27] gives the punishment regulations for damaging dock facilities in the Ratchet port management regulations. According to the rule, those who damage dock facilities will be sentenced to fifteen days of forced labor and must compensate for the damages.
conversations.content: According to the Ratchet port management regulations, the Goblin will be sentenced to fifteen days of forced labor and must compensate for the damages.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
